mapper.sql: i.UIDNumber, i.CompanyCode, i.DeptCode, i.UserName, i.Email, i.UID, i.UserStatus, i.ObjectCategory, i.Password, i.UserRole, i.Mobile, g.GroupName, (SELECT TOP 1 h.Name FROM T_IDM_HRCODE h WHERE h.HRCode = i.TitleCode AND h.Separator = 'TITLE') AS titleName
LEFT JOIN T_IDM_GROUP g ON i.DeptCode = g.GroupCode AND i.CompanyCode = g.CompanyCode
mapper.select: SELECT CompanyCode, Name, Status FROM T_IDM_COMPANY WHERE Status = '10' AND CompanyCode = '0100004' ORDER BY Name

SELECT CompanyCode, GroupCode, UpperGroupCode, GroupName, GroupLevel, GroupStatus FROM T_IDM_GROUP WHERE GroupStatus = '10' AND CompanyCode = '0100004' ORDER BY CompanyCode, GroupLevel, CASE WHEN GroupCode IN ('11647', '12173') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, GroupName

SELECT UIDNumber, CompanyCode, DeptCode, UserName, Email, UID, UserStatus, ObjectCategory, Password, UserRole, Mobile, (SELECT TOP 1 h.Name FROM T_IDM_HRCODE h WHERE h.HRCode = i.TitleCode AND h.Separator = 'TITLE') AS titleName FROM T_IDM_USER i WHERE UserStatus = '10' AND CompanyCode = '0100004' ORDER BY CompanyCode, DeptCode, UserName

SELECT FROM T_IDM_USER i
WHERE i.UID = #{uid} AND i.UserStatus = '10'

SELECT FROM T_IDM_USER i
WHERE i.UIDNumber = #{uidNumber} AND i.UserStatus = '10'

SELECT FROM T_IDM_USER i
WHERE i.Email = #{email} AND i.UserStatus = '10'

SELECT FROM T_IDM_USER i
WHERE i.UserStatus = '10' AND i.Password IS NOT NULL AND i.Password != '' ORDER BY i.UserName
